content: I just started the game, I've pull for ultra unit atm (I already have tinct and liz ) because I like their design but I'm not sure if it's a very beginning friendly gameplay. Also I don't know which banner is worth pulling for and what's the better banner to pull in it.
thread_title: Recommend realm as a beginner, and what to invest the silver/silver core in

content:
Ultra / Caro / Aqua are all good banners.

Every realm can be played by beginners.

In Ultra the best beginner standard units are Jenkins and Winkle.

Right now there is a Thais banner and Thais wheel (both red Caro). You should pull for them.

There also is a Doresain banner - you should pull for the unit only (you can skip his wheel for now. And after playing with him for a bit decide if you want his wheel then.)

Here is a photo of the best team you can make right now with the current banners.
thread_title: Recommend realm as a beginner, and what to invest the silver/silver core in

content: How did you get winkle ? I don't see here in any banner. And what's the role of each one ?  As far as I know winkle and Thaïs are  both support unit  so I guess doresain or faint are a damages dealer ?
thread_title: Recommend realm as a beginner, and what to invest the silver/silver core in

content:
Winkle is found on the standard ultra banner.

When you pull for Thais and Doresain (Caro limited units), you will probably end up getting Faint (Caro Standard.)

Doresain - DPS
Winkle - Aliemus battery / sheild
Thais - Support 
Faint - Death resist - another form of defense
thread_title: Recommend realm as a beginner, and what to invest the silver/silver core in
